# Kingsley Afolabi Aremu

> Kingsley Afolabi Aremu is a Lagos-based full-stack engineer and creative engineer building polished web products, mobile experiences, AI agent tooling, automation systems, and performance-focused interfaces.

## Featured Work

- FormMate AI: FormMate AI turns a form URL and a short conversational intake into editable draft responses. Automation stops before submission, leaving the user to review, correct, and decide what gets used. Tech/focus: typescript, ai, voice, automation. repo: https://github.com/iice257/FormMate | live: https://form-mate-ai.vercel.app
- PasteVault: PasteVault is an installable personal clipboard for saving and finding text, code, links, and JSON across devices. It replaces the habit of messaging yourself with a focused, searchable workspace. Tech/focus: javascript, pwa, productivity, clipboard. repo: https://github.com/iice257/PasteVault | live: https://pastevault-lime.vercel.app
- AI Agent Skills: AI Agent Skills is a collection of small, reusable workflows for research, planning, parsing, publishing, and maintenance. Together, they turn recurring agent work into explicit procedures instead of one-off prompts. Tech/focus: python, codex, agents, automation. repo: https://github.com/iice257/Skills-quickstarter | live: https://skills-quickstarter.vercel.app
- Restore AI: Restore AI is a mobile image-repair workflow for restoration, upscaling, resizing, and recoloring. It frames technical image processing as a simple before-and-after decision for personal and professional photos. Tech/focus: mobile, ai image, restoration, ux. repo: https://github.com/iice257/RestoreAI

## Highlighted Portfolio System

- 2026 Portfolio: The current portfolio website and the codebase powering this page. Tech/focus: next.js, performance, interaction design, ci. repo: https://github.com/iice257/2026-Portfolio | live: https://kingsleyaremu.vercel.app

## Major Project Signals

- Bountic: A bounty board for funding agent-assisted open-source tasks with USDC. Tech/focus: crypto, agents, open source. repo: https://github.com/iice257/bountic | live: https://bountic.vercel.app
- Loop Monitor: A local dashboard for tracking agent runs, bounty queues, and judge results. Tech/focus: dashboard, agents, ops. repo: https://github.com/iice257/loop-monitor
- Rustchain: A DePIN network where vintage hardware participates in a Proof-of-Antiquity protocol. Tech/focus: blockchain, depin, hardware. repo: https://github.com/iice257/Rustchain | live: https://rustchain.org
- Pages Forward: A rebuilt bookstore surface with clearer browsing, product framing, and commerce intent. Tech/focus: javascript, commerce, frontend, content. repo: https://github.com/iice257/Pages-forward-rebuild
- SignalOps: A security and operations cockpit for triage, status, and action queues. Tech/focus: typescript, security, ops. repo: https://github.com/iice257/signalops | live: https://signalops-orpin.vercel.app
- Unfollowr: A dashboard for reviewing follow status, engagement, and cleanup actions. Tech/focus: typescript, dashboard, social. repo: https://github.com/iice257/Unfollowr
